W

wrap(WrappedCheckedException.Task) - Static method in exception com.github.cowwoc.pouch.core.WrappedCheckedException
Wraps any checked exceptions thrown by a task.
wrap(String, Throwable) - Static method in exception com.github.cowwoc.pouch.core.WrappedCheckedException
Wraps an exception, unless it is a RuntimeException.
wrap(Throwable) - Static method in exception com.github.cowwoc.pouch.core.WrappedCheckedException
Wraps an exception, unless it is a RuntimeException.
wrap(Callable<V>) - Static method in exception com.github.cowwoc.pouch.core.WrappedCheckedException
Wraps any checked exceptions thrown by a callable.
WrappedCheckedException - Exception in com.github.cowwoc.pouch.core
A runtime exception dedicated to wrapping checked exceptions.
WrappedCheckedException.Task - Interface in com.github.cowwoc.pouch.core
A Callable without a return value.
